examples: This pulmonary infection is due to coccidioidomycosis, as evidenced by the two large spherules filled with endospores.
The FDA also has received reports of cases of coccidioidomycosis and blastomycosis, including deaths, in patients treated with TNF blockers.
It may also be seen in tuberculosis, sarcoidosis, histoplasmosis, coccidioidomycosis, blastomycosis, ulcerative colitis, and with use of some medications.
